task_brief:
Final pre-build QA review of metaswarm and SwarmMesh readiness using the synced launcher and fixed Agent Pulse. Verify commander launch, premium model policy, collaboration bus creation, sub-agent telemetry, Agent Pulse live counts, stop/recovery behavior, and implementation gaps. Review-only: do not modify source files.
Focus: Audit premium model policy, banned-model enforcement, Depth Guard, bounded spawning, partial/failure handling, stop, teardown, and recovery behavior.
